# Vitus Labs — Full API Reference

> Modular React UI ecosystem: components, styling, layout, hooks, animations, and theming — with web and React Native support.

---

## @vitus-labs/core

Configuration, initialization, and shared utilities. Every app must call `init()` before rendering.

### init(config)

Initializes the CSS engine and platform configuration.

```tsx
import { init } from '@vitus-labs/core'
import * as connector from '@vitus-labs/connector-styler'

init({ ...connector, component: 'div', textComponent: 'span' })
```

**Config properties:**
- `css` — CSS template tag function (required via connector)
- `styled` — Styled component factory (required via connector)
- `provider` — Theme provider component (required via connector)
- `keyframes` — Keyframes template tag (optional)
- `createGlobalStyle` — Global style factory (optional)
- `useTheme` — Theme hook (optional)
- `component` — Default HTML element for Element (e.g. 'div')
- `textComponent` — Default HTML element for Text (e.g. 'span')
- `createMediaQueries` — Custom media query factory (optional, native uses Dimensions)

### CSSEngineConnector Interface

```typescript
interface CSSEngineConnector {
  css: (strings: TemplateStringsArray, ...values: any[]) => any
  styled: (tag: any, options?: any) => (strings: TemplateStringsArray, ...values: any[]) => any
  provider: FC<{ theme: any; children: ReactNode }>
  keyframes?: (strings: TemplateStringsArray, ...values: any[]) => any
  createGlobalStyle?: (strings: TemplateStringsArray, ...values: any[]) => any
  useTheme?: () => any
}
```

### config (singleton)

Lazy delegate — destructure at module level, resolves after `init()`:
```tsx
const { css, styled } = config  // safe before init()
```

### Utilities

```tsx
import { get, set, merge, pick, omit, compose, throttle, isEmpty, isEqual } from '@vitus-labs/core'

get(obj, 'a.b.c')                    // deep get by dot path
set(obj, 'a.b.c', value)             // deep set (mutates)
merge(target, source)                 // deep merge
pick(obj, ['a', 'b'])                // keep only listed keys
omit(obj, ['a', 'b'])                // remove listed keys
compose(fn1, fn2, fn3)(value)        // right-to-left composition
throttle(fn, 200)                    // throttle execution
isEmpty(value)                       // check empty
isEqual(a, b)                        // deep equality
```

### Other Exports

- `Provider` — Context provider component
- `context` — React context object
- `render(vnode)` — Generic render function
- `useStableValue(value)` — Stabilize value across renders
- `hoistNonReactStatics(target, source)` — Hoist statics from wrapped component
- `HTML_TAGS`, `HTML_TEXT_TAGS` — Valid HTML tag arrays

---

## @vitus-labs/styler

High-performance CSS-in-JS engine (~3KB gzipped). Drop-in replacement for styled-components.

### css

Tagged template for composable CSS fragments:

```tsx
const base = css`
  color: ${p => p.theme.colors.primary};
  padding: 1rem;
`

const active = css`
  font-weight: bold;
  ${base}
`
```

Returns lazy `CSSResult` — resolved at render time with component props/theme.

### styled

Component factory:

```tsx
// Tagged template
const Button = styled.button`
  background: blue;
  color: white;
  &:hover { opacity: 0.8; }
`

// With options
const Card = styled('div', {
  shouldForwardProp: (prop) => !prop.startsWith('$'),
  boost: true,  // doubles selector specificity (0,2,0)
})`
  padding: ${p => p.$spacing}px;
`

// Polymorphic
<Button as="a" href="/link">Click</Button>
```

### keyframes

```tsx
const spin = keyframes`
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
`
const Spinner = styled.div`animation: ${spin} 1s linear infinite;`
```

### createGlobalStyle

```tsx
const GlobalStyles = createGlobalStyle`
  body { margin: 0; font-family: sans-serif; }
`
// Render: <GlobalStyles />
```

### ThemeProvider & useTheme

```tsx
<ThemeProvider theme={{ colors: { primary: '#0066ff' } }}>
  <App />
</ThemeProvider>

// In component:
const theme = useTheme()

// Type augmentation:
declare module '@vitus-labs/styler' {
  interface DefaultTheme {
    colors: { primary: string }
  }
}
```

### Interpolation Types

Function interpolations receive `{ theme, ...props }`:
```tsx
styled.div`
  color: ${p => p.theme.colors.primary};
  ${p => p.$active && css`font-weight: bold;`}
  ${baseStyles}
  ${[style1, style2]}
`
```

### Performance

- **Static path** (no functions): CSS computed once at module creation, className cached
- **Dynamic path** (has functions): Re-resolved per render, CSS string cache prevents recomputation
- **SSR**: React 19 `<style precedence>` for FOUC-free streaming
- **Client**: `useInsertionEffect` + single shared `<style>` DOM node

---

## @vitus-labs/elements

Base UI primitives for building interfaces.

### Element

Flexible container with layout utilities and content slots:

```tsx
<Element
  tag="section"
  direction="rows"
  gap={16}
  alignX="center"
  alignY="center"
  padding={24}
  beforeContent={<Icon />}
  afterContent={<Arrow />}
  css={css`border: 1px solid gray;`}
>
  Main content
</Element>
```

**Props:**
- `tag` — HTML element (default from init config)
- `innerRef` — Ref forwarding
- `children`, `content`, `label` — Content (multiple modes)
- `block` — Display block vs inline-flex
- `direction` — 'inline' | 'rows' | 'reverseInline' | 'reverseRows'
- `gap` — Spacing between items
- `alignX`, `alignY` — Self alignment
- `contentAlignX`, `contentAlignY` — Content alignment
- `beforeContent`, `afterContent` — Slot content
- `beforeContentAlignX/Y`, `afterContentAlignX/Y` — Slot alignment
- `equalBeforeAfter` — Match before/after slot sizes
- `css`, `contentCss`, `beforeContentCss`, `afterContentCss` — CSS extensions

### Text

Semantic text component:

```tsx
<Text tag="h1" paragraph>Hello World</Text>
```

**Props:** `children`, `label`, `tag`, `paragraph` (renders as `<p>`), `block`, `css`

### List

Data-driven list rendering:

```tsx
<List
  data={items}
  itemKey="id"
  rootElement
  gap={8}
  component={({ item }) => <Card>{item.name}</Card>}
/>
```

### Overlay

Positioned overlay for dropdowns, tooltips, popovers, modals:

```tsx
<Overlay
  type="dropdown"
  openOn="click"
  closeOn="clickOutsideContent"
  align="bottom"
  alignX="left"
  offsetY={4}
  closeOnEsc
  trigger={({ ref, active }) => (
    <button ref={ref}>Toggle {active ? '▲' : '▼'}</button>
  )}
  content={({ active }) => (
    <div>Dropdown content</div>
  )}
/>
```

**Props:**
- `type`: dropdown | tooltip | popover | modal | custom
- `openOn`: click | hover | manual
- `closeOn`: click | clickOnTrigger | clickOutsideContent | hover | manual
- `align`: top | bottom | left | right
- `alignX`: left | center | right
- `alignY`: top | center | bottom
- `offsetX`, `offsetY` — Pixel offset from trigger
- `position`: absolute | fixed | relative | static
- `closeOnEsc` — ESC key closes
- `disabled` — Blocks opening
- `onOpen`, `onClose` — Event callbacks

### Portal

DOM portal:

```tsx
<Portal DOMLocation={document.getElementById('modals')} tag="div">
  <Modal />
</Portal>
```

**Web only** — not exported in native builds.

---

## @vitus-labs/attrs

Chainable component factory for composable component configuration.

### Factory

```tsx
import attrs from '@vitus-labs/attrs'

const Button = attrs({ name: 'Button', component: Element })
  .attrs({ tag: 'button', type: 'button' })
  .attrs<{ primary?: boolean }>(({ primary }) => ({
    css: primary ? primaryStyles : defaultStyles,
  }))
  .config({ name: 'PrimaryButton' })
  .statics({ isButton: true })
  .compose({ withTooltip: TooltipHOC })
```

### Chain Methods

**`.attrs(param, config?)`**
- Object: `{ propName: value }` — static defaults
- Callback: `(props) => ({ ... })` — dynamic computation
- Config: `{ priority: boolean, filter: string[] }`
- Priority attrs resolve first (overwritten by normal attrs and explicit props)

**`.config({ name?, component?, DEBUG? })`**
- Update display name or swap wrapped component

**`.statics(param)`**
- Attach static values: `{ isCustom: true, variant: 'primary' }`
- Access via `Component.meta.isCustom`

**`.compose(param)`**
- HOC composition: `{ hocName: WrappingFunction }`
- Remove with `{ hocName: false }`

### Props Merge Order

`priorityAttrs` → `normalAttrs` → `explicit props` (last wins, undefined values filtered)

---

## @vitus-labs/rocketstyle

Multi-state styling system with dimensions, themes, and dark/light mode support.

### Factory

```tsx
import rocketstyle from '@vitus-labs/rocketstyle'

const Button = rocketstyle({
  dimensions: {
    size: ['sm', 'md', 'lg'],
    variant: ['primary', 'secondary', 'ghost'],
  },
  useBooleans: true,
})({ name: 'Button', component: Element })
  .theme(({ colors }) => ({
    backgroundColor: colors.primary,
    color: colors.text,
  }))
  .styles((css) => css`
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  `)
  .size({
    sm: { fontSize: 14, padding: '4px 8px' },
    md: { fontSize: 16, padding: '8px 16px' },
    lg: { fontSize: 18, padding: '12px 24px' },
  })
  .variant({
    primary: (theme) => ({ backgroundColor: theme.colors.primary }),
    secondary: (theme) => ({ backgroundColor: theme.colors.secondary }),
    ghost: { backgroundColor: 'transparent' },
  })
```

Usage:
```tsx
// With boolean props (when useBooleans: true)
<Button lg primary>Click me</Button>

// With explicit dimension props
<Button size="lg" variant="primary">Click me</Button>
```

### Chain Methods

**`.theme(param)`**
- Object or callback: `(theme, css) => ({ ... })`
- Dark/light mode: `(theme, mode, css) => ({ bg: mode('black', 'white') })`

**`.styles(param)`**
- `(css) => css\`...CSS...\`` — rendered styles

**`.attrs(param, config?)`**
- Same as attrs, but callback receives theme: `(props, theme, helpers) => ({ ... })`

**`.config(options)`**
- `provider` — Component becomes theme provider
- `consumer` — Consume parent provider theme
- `inversed` — Invert dark/light theme
- `passProps` — Forward props to origin component

**Dimension methods** (dynamic based on config):
- `.size({ sm: {...}, md: {...} })`, `.variant({ primary: {...} })`, etc.

---

## @vitus-labs/unistyle

170+ CSS property mappings with responsive breakpoints and automatic unit conversion.

### makeItResponsive

Core responsive engine:

```tsx
const responsiveStyles = makeItResponsive({
  css,
  styles: ({ theme, css, rootSize }) => css`
    padding: ${theme.padding};
    margin: ${theme.margin};
    background: ${theme.background};
  `,
})
```

### Responsive Syntax

All responsive-aware props accept:
```tsx
// Single value (all breakpoints)
<Element padding={16} />

// Array (mobile-first: xs, sm, md, lg, xl)
<Element padding={[8, 12, 16, 24, 32]} />

// Breakpoint object
<Element padding={{ xs: 8, md: 16, xl: 32 }} />
```

### Unit Conversion

- Numbers → rem (web) or px (native)
- Strings with units → unchanged
- `rootSize` defaults to 16

### Default Breakpoints

```
xs: 0, sm: 576, md: 768, lg: 992, xl: 1200
```

Mobile-first: uses `min-width` media queries in em units.

### Key Exports

- `makeItResponsive` — Responsive CSS wrapper
- `createMediaQueries` — Builds breakpoint → media query map
- `sortBreakpoints` — Sort breakpoints ascending
- `normalizeTheme`, `transformTheme` — Theme data transformers
- `styles` — Property mapping system
- `alignContent` — Flexbox/grid alignment utilities
- `stripUnit`, `value`, `values` — Unit manipulation
- `extendCss` — Extend base CSS with additional rules

---

## @vitus-labs/coolgrid

Responsive 12-column grid system.

### Components

```tsx
import { Container, Row, Col } from '@vitus-labs/coolgrid'

<Container columns={12} gap={16} padding={20}>
  <Row contentAlignX="spaceBetween">
    <Col size={{ xs: 12, md: 6, lg: 4 }}>
      Column 1
    </Col>
    <Col size={{ xs: 12, md: 6, lg: 4 }}>
      Column 2
    </Col>
    <Col size={{ xs: 12, md: 12, lg: 4 }}>
      Column 3
    </Col>
  </Row>
</Container>
```

### Container Props

- `columns` — Grid columns (default 12)
- `gap` — Gutter between columns (responsive)
- `gutter` — Additional spacing
- `padding` — Internal padding (responsive)
- `containerWidth` — Max-width per breakpoint
- `contentAlignX` — center | left | right | spaceAround | spaceBetween | spaceEvenly
- `colCss`, `rowCss` — CSS overrides for child Col/Row
- `component` — Custom HTML element

### Col Props

- `size` — Column span (responsive: number, array, or breakpoint object)
- Inherits gap, gutter, columns from Container/Row context

### Platform Support

- Web: CSS flex layout with calc()
- Native: Uses `onLayout` + context-based width calculation

---

## @vitus-labs/hooks

27+ React hooks for common patterns.

### DOM & Element

| Hook | Signature | Purpose |
|------|-----------|---------|
| `useClickOutside` | `(ref, handler)` | Detect click/touch outside element |
| `useElementSize` | `() => [refCallback, { width, height }]` | Track element dimensions via ResizeObserver |
| `useFocusTrap` | `(ref, enabled?)` | Trap Tab/Shift+Tab within container |
| `useHover` | `(initial?) => { hover, onMouseEnter, onMouseLeave }` | Hover state with spread handlers |
| `useFocus` | `(initial?) => { focused, onFocus, onBlur }` | Focus state with spread handlers |
| `useIntersection` | `(options?) => [refCallback, entry]` | Viewport intersection observation |
| `useScrollLock` | `(enabled)` | Lock page scroll (reference counted) |

### State Management

| Hook | Signature | Purpose |
|------|-----------|---------|
| `useControllableState` | `({ value?, defaultValue, onChange? }) => [value, setValue]` | Unified controlled/uncontrolled pattern |
| `useToggle` | `(initial?) => [value, toggle, setTrue, setFalse]` | Boolean state with helpers |
| `usePrevious` | `(value) => previousValue` | Value from previous render |
| `useLatest` | `(value) => ref` | Ref always holding latest value |

### Timing

| Hook | Signature | Purpose |
|------|-----------|---------|
| `useTimeout` | `(callback, delay) => { reset, clear }` | Declarative setTimeout (null disables) |
| `useInterval` | `(callback, delay)` | Declarative setInterval (null pauses) |
| `useDebouncedCallback` | `(callback, delay) => debouncedFn` | Debounced callback with cancel/flush |
| `useDebouncedValue` | `(value, delay) => debouncedValue` | Debounced value |
| `useThrottledCallback` | `(callback, delay) => throttledFn` | Throttled callback with cancel |
| `useUpdateEffect` | `(effect, deps?)` | useEffect that skips initial mount |

### Layout & Responsive

| Hook | Signature | Purpose |
|------|-----------|---------|
| `useWindowResize` | `(params?) => { width, height }` | Viewport size (throttled 200ms) |
| `useBreakpoint` | `() => string \| undefined` | Active breakpoint name from theme |
| `useMediaQuery` | `(query) => boolean` | CSS media query subscription |

### Theme & Styling

| Hook | Signature | Purpose |
|------|-----------|---------|
| `useRootSize` | `() => { rootSize, pxToRem, remToPx }` | Root font size + conversion helpers |
| `useThemeValue` | `(path) => value` | Deep-read theme by dot-path |
| `useColorScheme` | `() => 'light' \| 'dark'` | OS color scheme preference |
| `useSpacing` | `(base?) => (multiplier) => string` | Spacing function (default 8px base) |

### Accessibility

| Hook | Signature | Purpose |
|------|-----------|---------|
| `useReducedMotion` | `() => boolean` | Detects prefers-reduced-motion |

### Utilities

| Hook | Signature | Purpose |
|------|-----------|---------|
| `useMergedRef` | `(...refs) => callbackRef` | Merge multiple refs into one |
| `useIsomorphicLayoutEffect` | — | useLayoutEffect on client, useEffect on server |

---

## @vitus-labs/kinetic

CSS-transition based animation components.

### Transition

```tsx
import { Transition } from '@vitus-labs/kinetic'
import { fadeUp } from '@vitus-labs/kinetic-presets'

<Transition show={visible} appear {...fadeUp}>
  <div>Animated content</div>
</Transition>
```

**Props:**
- `show` — Controls visibility (enter/leave)
- `appear` — Animate on initial mount
- `unmount` — Remove from DOM when hidden (default true, else display:none)
- `timeout` — Safety timeout ms (default 5000)
- Class-based: `enter`, `enterFrom`, `enterTo`, `leave`, `leaveFrom`, `leaveTo`
- Style-based: `enterStyle`, `enterToStyle`, `enterTransition`, `leaveStyle`, `leaveToStyle`, `leaveTransition`
- Callbacks: `onEnter`, `onAfterEnter`, `onLeave`, `onAfterLeave`

### TransitionGroup

Key-based enter/exit for lists:

```tsx
<TransitionGroup {...fadeUp}>
  {items.map(item => <div key={item.id}>{item.name}</div>)}
</TransitionGroup>
```

### Stagger

Sequential animation with configurable delay:

```tsx
<Stagger show={visible} interval={50} reverseLeave {...fadeUp}>
  {items.map(item => <div key={item.id}>{item.name}</div>)}
</Stagger>
```

**Additional props:** `interval` (delay between children, default 50ms), `reverseLeave` (reverse order on exit)

### Collapse

Height-aware expand/collapse:

```tsx
<Collapse show={expanded} transition="height 300ms ease">
  <div>Collapsible content</div>
</Collapse>
```

### Lifecycle Stages

`hidden` → `entering` → `entered` → `leaving` → `hidden`

Respects `prefers-reduced-motion` automatically.

---

## @vitus-labs/kinetic-presets

65+ animation presets and composition utilities.

### Preset Categories

**Fades:** fade, fadeUp, fadeDown, fadeLeft, fadeRight, fadeUpBig, fadeDownBig, fadeLeftBig, fadeRightBig, fadeUpLeft, fadeUpRight, fadeDownLeft, fadeDownRight, fadeScale
**Slides:** slideUp, slideDown, slideLeft, slideRight, slideUpBig, slideDownBig, slideLeftBig, slideRightBig
**Scales:** scaleIn, scaleOut, scaleUp, scaleDown, scaleInUp, scaleInDown, scaleInLeft, scaleInRight, scaleRotateIn
**Blurs:** blurIn, blurInUp, blurInDown, blurInLeft, blurInRight, blurScale
**Rotations:** rotateIn, rotateInUp, rotateInDown, rotateInReverse
**Flips:** flipX, flipXReverse, flipY, flipYReverse, flipDiagonal, flipDiagonalReverse
**Clips:** clipTop, clipBottom, clipLeft, clipRight, clipCenter, clipCorner, clipCircle, clipDiamond
**Bounces:** bounceIn, bounceInUp, bounceInDown, bounceInLeft, bounceInRight, springIn
**Perspectives:** perspectiveUp, perspectiveDown, perspectiveLeft, perspectiveRight
**Swings:** swingInTop, swingInBottom, swingInLeft, swingInRight
**Others:** puffIn, puffOut, swirlIn, swirlInReverse, tiltInUp/Down/Left/Right, rubberIn, squishX/Y, lightSpeedInLeft/Right, floatUp/Down/Left/Right, pushInLeft/Right, skewIn/InReverse/InY/InYReverse, zoomIn/Out/InUp/InDown/InLeft/InRight, spinIn/InReverse, slitHorizontal/Vertical, popIn, expandX/Y, drop, rise, newspaperIn

### Customizable Factories

```tsx
import { createFade, createSlide, createScale, createRotate, createBlur } from '@vitus-labs/kinetic-presets'

const customFade = createFade({
  direction: 'up',
  distance: 32,
  duration: 400,
  leaveDuration: 200,
  easing: 'ease-out',
  leaveEasing: 'ease-in',
})

const customScale = createScale({ from: 0.8, duration: 300 })
const customRotate = createRotate({ degrees: 45, duration: 500 })
const customBlur = createBlur({ amount: 12, scale: 0.95 })
```

### Composition Utilities

```tsx
import { compose, withDuration, withEasing, withDelay, reverse } from '@vitus-labs/kinetic-presets'

// Combine presets
const fadeAndScale = compose(fadeUp, scaleIn)

// Override timing
const slowFade = withDuration(fadeUp, 800, 400)
const bouncyFade = withEasing(fadeUp, 'cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)')
const delayedFade = withDelay(fadeUp, 200)

// Swap enter ↔ leave
const fadeOut = reverse(fadeUp)
```

### Preset Shape

```typescript
type Preset = {
  enterStyle?: CSSProperties
  enterToStyle?: CSSProperties
  leaveStyle?: CSSProperties
  leaveToStyle?: CSSProperties
  enterTransition?: string
  leaveTransition?: string
  enter?: string       // CSS class
  enterFrom?: string
  enterTo?: string
  leave?: string
  leaveFrom?: string
  leaveTo?: string
}
```

---

## @vitus-labs/rocketstories

Auto-generated Storybook stories from rocketstyle components.

### Usage

```tsx
import rocketstories from '@vitus-labs/rocketstories'

const stories = rocketstories(Button)
  .storyOptions({ direction: 'rows', gap: 16 })
  .attrs({ children: 'Click me' })

export default stories.init()
export const Main = stories.main()
export const Sizes = stories.dimension('size')
export const Variants = stories.dimension('variant')
export const Custom = stories.render((props) => (
  <div>
    <Button {...props} primary>Primary</Button>
    <Button {...props} secondary>Secondary</Button>
  </div>
))
```

### Story Methods

- `.main()` — Default showcase (all dimension combinations for rocketstyle)
- `.dimension(key, options?)` — Matrix of all values for a dimension
- `.render(callback)` — Custom render story
- `.list(params)` — List-based rendering

### Configuration

- `.storyOptions({ direction, alignX, alignY, gap, pseudo })` — Layout
- `.controls({ propName: { type, options, description } })` — Storybook controls
- `.attrs(defaults)` — Default props
- `.config({ name, prefix, decorators })` — Meta config
- `.decorators([...])` — Storybook decorators

---

## Connector Packages

### @vitus-labs/connector-styler

Re-exports styler as CSSEngineConnector:
```tsx
import * as connector from '@vitus-labs/connector-styler'
init(connector)
```

### @vitus-labs/connector-native

React Native connector:
```tsx
import * as connector from '@vitus-labs/connector-native'
import { View, Text } from 'react-native'
init({ ...connector, component: View, textComponent: Text })
```

- `css` — Parses CSS strings to RN style objects
- `styled` — Wraps RN components, filters `as`/`$`-prefixed/`data-*` props
- `createMediaQueries` — Uses `Dimensions.get('window').width`

---

## Platform Support

| Feature | Web | React Native |
|---------|-----|-------------|
| Element, Text, List | Yes | Yes |
| Overlay, Portal | Yes | No (DOM-dependent) |
| Coolgrid | CSS flex + calc() | onLayout + context width |
| Media queries | CSS @media | Dimensions API |
| Styler | Full CSS | CSS string → RN style |
| Kinetic | CSS transitions | Separate .native.ts |

`.native.ts` file convention: auto-resolved by Metro bundler and rolldown build.

---

## Developer Tools

Monorepo of pre-configured build, lint, test, and dev tools. All packages are ESM (`"type": "module"`), configured via `vl-tools.config.mjs`.

### @vitus-labs/tools-core

Shared config loader and package metadata. Loads `vl-tools.config.mjs` files with cascading resolution (root → package). Exports: `defineConfig`, `PKG`, `VL_CONFIG`, `TS_CONFIG`, `loadFileToJSON`, `swapGlobals`.

### @vitus-labs/tools-rolldown

Rust-based bundler for TypeScript libraries. Reads `package.json` fields (`exports`, `main`, `module`, `browser`, `umd:main`, `unpkg`) to generate ESM/CJS/UMD/IIFE output with automatic DTS generation. Supports subpath exports — `"./devtools"` auto-resolves to `src/devtools`, with separate `.d.ts` per subpath. Passthrough exports (e.g., `"./package.json"`) are skipped. Injects platform globals (`__WEB__`, `__NATIVE__`, `__BROWSER__`, `__NODE__`, `__CLIENT__`, `__VERSION__`).

**Advanced build options** for non-library targets (Chrome extensions, CLI tools, Lambda, Electron):
- `entries` — Explicit input/output pairs with per-entry format, bypasses package.json detection
- `bundleAll` — Bundle all dependencies (no externals)
- `copyFiles` — Copy static assets post-build
- `banner` / `footer` — Inject text at top/bottom of output (e.g., shebangs)
- `alias` — Resolve aliases for import remapping
- `plugins` — Custom rolldown plugins

CLI: `vl_rolldown_build`, `vl_rolldown_watch`

### @vitus-labs/tools-rollup

Legacy Rollup-based bundler with DTS via API Extractor. Same output format detection and config as rolldown. CLI: `vl_build`, `vl_build-watch`.

### @vitus-labs/tools-vitest

Shared Vitest config factory. `createVitestConfig()` returns config with coverage, path aliases, and sensible defaults. Exports `DEFAULT_COVERAGE_EXCLUDE` and `DEFAULT_COVERAGE_INCLUDE` for `mergeConfig` compatibility. Peer dep: vite >= 8, vitest >= 4.

### @vitus-labs/tools-storybook

Preconfigured Storybook with auto-discovery indexer, addon mapping (a11y, themes, vitest, pseudo-states), and framework support (Next.js + Vite, React + Vite).

CLI: `vl_stories`, `vl_stories_build`, `vl_stories_monorepo`, `vl_stories_monorepo_build`

### @vitus-labs/tools-typescript

Shared tsconfig presets: `lib` (libraries, declaration emit), `app` (Next.js/apps, no emit), `base` (common strict settings).

### @vitus-labs/tools-lint

Shared Biome config for formatting and linting. Rules: noUnusedVariables, noUnusedImports, noUndeclaredVariables, useHookAtTopLevel, noExcessiveCognitiveComplexity (max 15), organizeImports, and more.

### @vitus-labs/tools-nextjs

Next.js config wrapper with security headers (HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, X-Frame-Options, Permissions-Policy), transpilePackages, and image optimization config.

### @vitus-labs/tools-nextjs-images

Image optimization for Next.js — WebP conversion, LQIP (Low Quality Image Placeholders), responsive images, SVG sprites. Resource query API: `?webp`, `?lqip`, `?resize`, `?sprite`.

### @vitus-labs/tools-atlas

Dependency graph visualizer and monorepo health analyzer. Scans workspace, detects cycles, computes depth/impact, version drift, health scores (0-100). Generates HTML reports and markdown.

CLI: `vl_atlas`, `vl_atlas_report`

### @vitus-labs/tools-favicon

Multi-platform favicon and PWA manifest generator. Outputs favicons, Apple touch icons, Android icons, MS tile images, and `manifest.webmanifest`.

### @vitus-labs/tools-mcp

MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for AI assistants. Exposes 3 tools and 12 documentation resources:
- `scaffold_package` — Bootstrap library, Next.js, or Storybook projects
- `add_tooling` — Add tools to existing projects (all 10 packages supported)
- `diagnose_config` — Detect misconfigurations (ESM, imports, deps, exports)
- `docs://vitus-labs/*` — Package documentation resources

Install: `bunx @vitus-labs/tools-mcp` or configure in Claude Desktop / Cursor MCP settings.

---

## Links

- Docs: https://vitus-labs.dev
- GitHub (UI System): https://github.com/vitus-labs/ui-system
- GitHub (Tools): https://github.com/vitus-labs/tools
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/org/vitus-labs
